title: 2019 John Deere 8R 340 Tractor
description: High-horsepower row-crop tractor with IVT transmission, 4WD, and 370 hp engine. Excellent condition with 1,850 hours. Fully equipped with precision ag technology.

title: 2021 Case IH Axial-Flow 250 Combine
description: Top-of-the-line combine harvester with Axial-Flow threshing technology. 473 hp engine, 620 bu grain tank, AFS Pro 700 display. Only 420 separator hours.

title: 2018 Kubota SVL75-2 Skid Steer
description: Compact track loader with 74.3 hp Kubota diesel engine. High-flow hydraulics, enclosed cab with A/C, 2,690 lb rated operating capacity. 1,100 hours.

title: 2020 Kinze 1050 Grain Cart
description: 1,050 bushel grain cart with 21" auger, scale system, and hydraulic spout rotation. Tandem axle, road lights, and grain level sight window. Excellent shape.

title: Frontier RC2060 Rotary Cutter
description: 5-foot rotary cutter compatible with Cat 1 three-point hitch. Shear bolt slip clutch, 6-gauge deck, and 25 hp gearbox. Lightly used, great for pasture maintenance.

title: 2017 New Holland T6.180 Tractor
description: Versatile utility tractor with 175 hp engine, Electro Command transmission, and front loader ready. 3,200 hours, well maintained with full service history.

title: 2022 Landoll 7431 Field Cultivator
description: 31-foot field cultivator with walking tandems, 3-bar spike tooth harrow, and hydraulic fold. Minimal use — only 2 seasons. Ready to work.

title: 2016 MacDon FD75 Draper Header
description: 40-foot draper header for combines. Double knife drive, adjustable skid shoes, and crop dividers. Compatible with most major combine brands via adapter.
